name: zbrain
description: Local-first brain/RAG benchmark and retrieval tool

scripts.bench:synthetic: node scripts/local-only-runner.js node bin/zbrain.js bench --manifest fixtures/synthetic/manifest.json --mode bm25 --json .cache/synthetic-results.json --md .cache/synthetic-results.md
scripts.check: npm test && npm run bench:synthetic && npm run bench:semantic
scripts.bench:semantic: node scripts/local-only-runner.js node bin/zbrain.js bench --manifest fixtures/semantic/manifest.json --mode bm25 --json .cache/semantic-results.json --md .cache/semantic-results.md --allow-raw-public-report && node scripts/semantic-readout.js fixtures/semantic/manifest.json .cache/semantic-results.json .cache/semantic-readout.md
